popularStory.headline: Alianore (Eleanor) Berkeley 1390-1455
popularStory.description:
Eleanor (died 1 Aug 1455), daughter of Sir John Berkeley, of Beverstone, Glos, and widow of (a) 13th/6th Earl of Arundel and (b) Sir Richard Poynings. [Burke's Peerage]
He [John d'Arundel] married, be …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Berkeley於大約1400年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，她的父親Sir John Berkeley49歲，母親Elizabeth de Betteshorne48歲。她於1420年3月14日與Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年12月8日之前在英國斯塔福爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Berkeley于大约1400年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東时，她的父亲Sir John Berkeley49岁，母亲Elizabeth de Betteshorne48岁。她于1420年3月14日与Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年12月8日之前在英国斯塔福爾，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Berkeley was born about 1400, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir John Berkeley, was 49 and her mother, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, was 48. She married Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley on 14 March 1420, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 8 December 1478, in Staffordshire, England, and was buried in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Berkeley est née environ 1400, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Berkeley, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley le 14 mars 1420, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 décembre 1478, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Berkeley um 1400 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Berkeley 49 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Betteshorne 48. Sie hat am 14. März 1420 in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Dezember 1478 in Staffordshire, England und wurde in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Berkeley è nata il circa 1400 nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir John Berkeley, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley il 14 marzo 1420, nel Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 8 dicembre 1478, nel Staffordshire, England, e fu sepolta a Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Berkeleyが約1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Berkeleyは49歳，母Elizabeth de Betteshorneは48歳であった。1420年3月14日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーでSir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年12月8日以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 애스턴 일 월스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Berkeley(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Berkeley(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Betteshorne(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1420년 3월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 12월 8일 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

pt.1434: de 10 de janeiro de 1434 a 9 de janeiro de 1435
pt.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, Un: Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Berkeley, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley em 14 de março de 1420, em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de dezembro de 1478, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: астон л валлс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Berkeley родилась около 1400 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Berkeley было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Betteshorne, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley 14 марта 1420 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 8 декабрь 1478 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1400, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Berkeley, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley el 14 de marzo de 1420, en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de diciembre de 1478, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
